name: company_db
what: Unified company database: every company the twin has touched, deduped on normalized-name+country, with per-record provenance (company_sources keeps each source layer's record verbatim). SQLite at data/companies.db; company_card view = one row per company.

schema.companies: canonical identity (name, name_norm, country, sector, ticker, is_india_entity)
schema.company_sources: provenance — (layer, role, as_of, payload verbatim JSON)
schema.credit_ratings: layer-24 rating channel (agency, rating, capex disclosure, rationale URL, care_check)
schema.clearance_activity: PARIVESH footprint (filings, states, activity, policy program, visibility verdict)
schema.company_card: VIEW — one row per company joining all of the above

identity_rule: dedup key = lowercased name with legal suffixes stripped (Ltd/Pvt/GmbH/Inc/...) + country; overlaps across layers merge, same-name different-country stay separate
enrichment_next: layer 31 catalogs the external IPA/NDAP sources whose company-level material (Invest India sector pages, IIG project sponsors, state-IPA investor lists) can be joined onto company_id

ii_ticker_validation.what: Invest India sector-page LATEST-UPDATES tickers scraped as an announcement channel and matched (conservatively, fragments kept for review) against the company DB; QUIET/PARTIALLY_VISIBLE clearance leads that the national IPA itself announces are flagged as challenged verdicts

exception_verdicts_challenged.announcement: Nayara Energy, India's largest private fuel retailer, plans to add 400 petrol pumps this year to expand its retail network
exception_verdicts_challenged.implication: verdict CHALLENGED — the national IPA itself surfaces this company; re-examine before citing the quiet verdict (displayed correction, verdict not overwritten)

weak_matches_for_review.announcement: Reliance Industries, Vedanta and the Adani group commit to invest INR 1.5 lakh Cr in Assam
Reliance Defence and US-based CMI eyes India's ₹20,000-cr defence MRO market with new JV
Reliance Industries plans a massive ecosystem in Navi Mumbai, including data centres and logistics
Reliance Retail plans to invest Rs. 40,000 crores in food parks
Indian multinational conglomerate, Reliance plans to invest an additional INR 50,000 Cr in Bengal by 2030
JioStar, the joint venture formed by Reliance Industries, Disney, and Bodhi Tree, to expand sports bouquet with new channel launches ahead of IPL
Anil Ambani-led Reliance Power Ltd to invest INR 10,000 Cr in Andhra solar projects
Mukesh Ambani-owned Reliance Industries, to build the world's largest data centre in Jamnagar
Auto components major Motherson forms a joint venture with Japan's Sanko for sustainable packaging solutions
JioStar, the joint venture formed by Reliance Industries, Disney, and Bodhi Tree, to expand sports bouquet with new channel launches ahead of IPL
Natural gas distribution major, Swan Energy and Singapore’s AG&P Terminals & Logistics plan a joint venture for supplying liquefied natural gas in India
Electronics contract manufacturer Dixon Technologies and Vivo form a joint venture to manufacture smartphones in India
Indian Rare Earth Limited (IREL) and Kazakh company to form joint venture to harness India's titanium potential

reviewed_promotions.reviewed: 2026-07-23: all rows eyeballed genuine — AstraZeneca Rs 176 cr Chennai GITC, Pegatron Chennai 5G plant, Airbus H125 order + Bengaluru GCC lease, Panasonic (Life Solutions India subsidiary, Andheri land), Vertiv Pune services centre; news channel: Sandisk (Yahoo Finance stock piece)
reviewed_and_rejected: RELIANCE, INC. (US namesake — rows are Indian Reliance groups)

ii_ticker_validation.caveat: ticker items are undated in the DOM and rotate — treat a match as 'announced at some point recently', not a dated event; source_url usually carries the date

news_collection.what: External news collection (Marketaux ticker-tagged, AlphaVantage sentiment, NewsAPI/Newsdata keyword FDI sweep + QUIET-company probes) matched onto the company DB with the shared tiered matcher; keys read from ~/.config/market-secrets/credentials.env
news_collection.quota_note: free tiers: NewsAPI/Marketaux ~100 req/day, AlphaVantage 25 — weekly cadence keeps usage well inside quotas; EODHD news endpoint not in plan (404), not called
